array.string: mkdir -p "$HOME/Scripts/market-brief/logs"; cd "$HOME/Scripts/market-brief"; \ for v in ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN ANTHROPIC_API_KEY ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL ANTHROPIC_BEDROCK ANTHROPIC_VERTEX_PROJECT_ID ANTHROPIC_VERTEX_REGION CLAUDE_CODE_PROVIDER_MANAGED_BY_HOST CLAUDE_CODE_SDK_HAS_OAUTH_REFRESH CLAUDE_CODE_ENTRYPOINT CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_CRON CLAUDE_CODE_EMIT_TOOL_USE_SUMMARIES CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_ASK_USER_QUESTION_TOOL CLAUDE_AGENT_SDK_VERSION CLAUDECODE; do unset "$v"; done; \ export CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN="$(jq -r .claudeCodeOauthToken secrets.json 2>/dev/null || "$HOME/hermes-agent/.venv/bin/python" -c "import json; print(json.load(open('secrets.json'))['claudeCodeOauthToken'])")"; \ exec "$HOME/hermes-agent/.venv/bin/python" listen_weixin.py
